faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I book this safari?
faq.a1: You can book directly through our website by clicking 'Book Now' or 'Inquire', or contact us via WhatsApp or email. Our team will respond within 24 hours with a personalized proposal.
faq.a2: Absolutely! Every safari we offer can be tailored to your preferences, budget, and travel dates. We can adjust accommodation, add extra days, or modify activities to suit your needs.
faq.q3: What should I pack for this safari?
faq.a3: We recommend neutral-colored clothing (khaki, beige, olive), comfortable walking shoes, sun protection (hat, sunscreen, sunglasses), binoculars, a camera, and layers for cooler mornings and evenings.
faq.a4: We strongly recommend comprehensive travel insurance that covers trip cancellation, medical emergencies, and evacuation. Some parks and activities may require proof of insurance.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: When is the best time to visit this park?
faq.a1: The best time varies by park, but generally the dry season (June to October) offers the best wildlife viewing as animals gather around water sources. The wet season (November to May) is ideal for birdwatching and lush landscapes.
faq.q2: What wildlife can I expect to see?
faq.a2: Each park has its unique wildlife. Our expert guides will help you spot the area's most iconic species. Sightings depend on season and time of day, but our experienced guides know the best spots.
faq.q3: Are there entry fees for the park?
faq.a3: Yes, all national parks and reserves have entry fees. These are typically included in our safari packages. Fees vary by park, visitor nationality, and age category. Contact us for current rates.
faq.q4: How do I get to this park?
faq.a4: Most parks are accessible by road from Arusha or nearby towns. We provide comfortable 4x4 vehicles with experienced drivers for all transfers. Some remote parks also offer fly-in options.

detail.lead: {name} is a national park in {region}, Tanzania — a prime safari destination for wildlife viewing on guided game drives with Kabengo Safaris.

detail.lead: {name} is a safari {type} in {region}, Tanzania, offering comfortable stays close to the wildlife as part of a Kabengo Safaris itinerary.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is included in a stay at this property?
faq.a1: Rates at most safari lodges and camps are full board (accommodation and all meals). Park fees, drinks and activities are detailed separately in your quote — we confirm exactly what's included when we tailor your itinerary.
faq.q2: How do I get to this lodge or camp?
faq.a2: Most properties are reached by road transfer or a short bush flight to a nearby airstrip. Your Kabengo Safaris itinerary includes all transfers between destinations.
faq.q3: Is it suitable for families or children?
faq.a3: Many lodges and camps welcome families, though some tented camps set a minimum age for young children. Tell us your group's ages and we'll match you with the right property.
faq.q4: When is the best time to stay?
faq.a4: It depends on the region — the dry season (June–October) is best for wildlife, while the green season (November–May) is quieter and lush. We advise based on your travel dates.

about.title: Kuhusu Kabengo Safaris
about.subtitle: Mlango wako wa safari zisizosahaulika za Afrika
about.storyText: Kabengo Safaris ilizaliwa kutoka shauku kubwa kwa wanyamapori na mandhari ya Afrika. Tukiwa na uzoefu wa miaka mingi katika tasnia ya safari, tunaunda safari za kibinafsi zinazounganisha wasafiri na uzuri wa asili wa Afrika Mashariki.
about.missionText: Kutoa safari bora zinazohamasisha uhifadhi, kusaidia jamii za mahali, na kuunda kumbukumbu za kudumu kwa wageni wetu.
about.visionText: Kuwa kampuni ya safari inayoaminiwa zaidi Afrika Mashariki.
about.whyExpertGuidesDesc: Waongoza wetu walioidhinishwa wanaleta ujuzi wa miaka mingi.
about.whyCustomItinerariesDesc: Kila safari imeundwa kulingana na mapendeleo yako.
about.whySafetyFirstDesc: Usalama wako ni kipaumbele chetu kikuu.
about.whySustainableDesc: Tumejitolea kwa uhifadhi na kusaidia jamii tunazozitembelea.
about.heroSubtitle: Kampuni ya safari ya kienyeji, inayoendeshwa na familia — tukibuni safari za kibinafsi, zilizoboreshwa kote Tanzania tangu siku ya kwanza.
about.storyP1: Kabengo Safaris ilianza kwa imani rahisi: njia bora ya kuiona Tanzania ni kupitia macho ya watu wanaoiita nyumbani. Ilianzishwa na kuongozwa na Enock Fabian — mwelekezi wa maisha aliyekulia ukingoni mwa mzunguko wa kaskazini — tulikua kutoka gari moja la Land Cruiser hadi timu ndogo iliyoshikamana ya waelekezi, wapangaji na wenyeji wataalamu.
about.storyP2: Hatuuzi viti kwenye basi. Kila safari tunayobuni ni ya kibinafsi na imeundwa kukuzunguka — mwendo wako, bajeti yako, ndoto zako. Kutoka uhamiaji wa Serengeti hadi kusini tulivu, tunapanga safari tungejivunia kuwapeleka familia zetu wenyewe.
about.founderQuote: “Nataka kila mgeni ahisi nilichohisi nikiwa mtoto nikitazama tembo alfajiri — kwamba nyika ni fursa, na ni jukumu letu kuilinda pamoja.”
about.howH2: Kutoka wazo la kwanza hadi tambarare wazi
about.step1Text: Shiriki tarehe, mapendeleo na bajeti yako — maswali machache tu yanatosha.
about.step2Text: Mtaalamu wa kienyeji hujenga ratiba ya kibinafsi kwa bei ya uwazi na ya kweli.
about.step3Text: Tunaboresha kila kipengele hadi kikamilifu — kisha uko tayari kwa Tanzania.
about.bandBody: Tuambie safari yako ya ndoto na mtaalamu wa kienyeji Arusha atabuni pendekezo lililoboreshwa — bila malipo, bila masharti.

whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hello! I'm interested in learning more about your safari packages.

privacy.bannerMessage: We respect your privacy — this website does not use cookies or tracking.

bookSection.title: Panga safari yako ya ndoto leo
bookSection.intro: Safari ya Tanzania ni safari ya mara moja maishani — nasi tunaifanya kuwa yako. Kutoka tambarare za Serengeti na Kreta ya Ngorongoro hadi fukwe za Zanzibar na kilele cha Kilimanjaro, chagua mojawapo ya ratiba zetu tayari au unde yako mwenyewe, jinsi upendavyo hasa.
bookSection.bestWayBody: Sisi ni timu ya wenyeji tulioko Arusha, wenye waelekezi na magari yetu ya safari wanaoifahamu nchi hii vizuri na hupanga kila jambo tangu mwanzo hadi mwisho. Tuambie mbuga na matukio unayoyaota — nasi tutabuni safari kamili kukuzunguka.
bookSection.trust1: Waelekezi wetu wa ndani na magari ya safari ya Land Cruiser
bookSection.trust3: Bei za uwazi na uaminifu — bila madalali

trust: Iliyoundwa kwa ajili yako na ya faragha
planner.interestsSub: Chagua kimoja au zaidi — tutaviunganisha katika safari moja.
planner.whereSub: Tafuta na uchague mbuga zinazokuvutia — au ruka, nasi tutapendekeza njia.
planner.daysSub: Wazo la jumla latosha — tutalisawazisha pamoja.
planner.whenSub: Msimu bora wa wanyamapori ni Juni–Oktoba — lakini kila mwezi una uzuri wake.
planner.childAgesTitle: Umri wa kila mtoto wakati wa safari
planner.budgetSub: Bei ya mwongozo, bila kujumuisha safari za ndege za kimataifa.
planner.notesSub: Kadiri unavyoshiriki zaidi, ndivyo pendekezo lako litakavyokuwa maalum.
planner.notesPlaceholder: Malazi maalum, wanyama wa kuona, aina ya chumba, kuchanganya safari na ufukwe…
planner.detailsSub: Ili mtaalamu aweze kukufikia na pendekezo lako.
planner.consent: Ningependa Kabengo iwasiliane nami kuhusu pendekezo langu la safari. Hakuna barua taka, kamwe.
planner.reviewSub: Ukaguzi wa haraka — bonyeza Rudi kubadilisha chochote, kisha tutumie.
planner.errName: Tafadhali weka jina lako la kwanza na la ukoo.
planner.errEmail: Tafadhali weka anwani sahihi ya barua pepe.
planner.errConsent: Tafadhali thibitisha tunaweza kuwasiliana nawe kuhusu pendekezo lako.
planner.successBody: Tutaandaa ratiba yako maalum na mtaalamu wa safari atakujibu ndani ya saa 24. Angalia sanduku lako la barua pepe.
planner.railH1: Unda safari yako ya ndoto ya Tanzania
planner.railTitle: Safari yako ya Tanzania, iliyopangwa kukuzunguka
planner.railBody: Jibu maswali machache ya haraka na mtaalamu wa ndani atatengeneza pendekezo bila malipo na bila wajibu — ratiba, malazi na bei za uwazi, vyote vilivyoundwa kwa ajili yako.
railTrust: Iliyoundwa kwa ajili yako na ya faragha

howItWorks.title: Safari yako, kutoka ndoto hadi kuondoka
howItWorks.intro: Kupanga safari iliyoundwa maalum ni rahisi kuliko unavyofikiri — hivi ndivyo inavyofanya kazi.
howItWorks.s1b: Tuambie kinachokuvutia, utakaposafiri na bajeti yako — kwenye mpangaji au kwa ujumbe mfupi.
howItWorks.s2b: Mtaalamu wa ndani hubuni ratiba binafsi yenye malazi na bei za uaminifu — bila malipo, bila wajibu.
howItWorks.s3b: Badilisha chochote hadi iwe kamili; tunakushauri kuhusu mbuga, wakati na bajeti.
howItWorks.s4b: Mwelekezi wako mwenyewe na gari la 4×4 hushughulikia kila jambo, tangu kuwasili hadi kuondoka.

explore.title: Safari yako itakupeleka wapi?
explore.actDesc: Safari za magari, za miguu, za puto na utamaduni
explore.stayDesc: Malazi na kambi za hema kwa kila mtindo

safariFinder.emptyBody: Tuambie unachotafuta na timu yetu ya Arusha itaijenga tangu mwanzo.
safariFinder.bandBody1: Timu yetu ya wenyeji Arusha hubuni safari maalum tangu mwanzo — tarehe zako, mwendo wako, bajeti yako.
safariFinder.bandBody2: Shiriki wazo la jumla nasi tutalifanya kuwa pendekezo la uwazi na la kina.
safariFinder.bottomTitle: Hujapata safari kamili? Tuambie ndoto yako.
safariFinder.bottomSubtitle: Hakuna safari ya kawaida hapa — kila safari ya Kabengo hujengwa kwa kundi moja la wasafiri kwa wakati mmoja.
safariFinder.faqQ1: Ni wakati gani bora wa kwenda?
safariFinder.faqA1: Juni–Oktoba kwa kutazama wanyama msimu wa kiangazi; Januari–Februari kwa msimu wa kuzaa. Tunashauri kulingana na tarehe zako.
safariFinder.faqA2: Safari nyingi maalum hugharimu kati ya $2,000 na $6,000 kwa mtu, bila safari za ndege za kimataifa.
safariFinder.faqA3: Shiriki mawazo yako, tunatuma pendekezo, unaboresha, kisha malipo ya awali huthibitisha safari. Hakuna malipo kuuliza.
safariFinder.faqA4: Ndiyo — kila safari ya Kabengo ni ya faragha kwa msingi, ikiwa na mwelekezi wako na gari la 4×4. Safari za makundi kwa ombi.

parksFinder.mostVisitedSub: huonekana mara nyingi katika safari zetu
parksFinder.emptyBody: Tuambie wanyamapori au eneo unalotaka nasi tutapanga safari kuelekea huko.
parksFinder.bandTitle: Huna uhakika ni hifadhi gani? Tutapanga safari kukuzunguka.
parksFinder.bandBody: Iambie timu yetu ya Arusha unachotafuta — uhamiaji, wanyama wakubwa, pembe tulivu — nasi tutaunda ratiba.
parksFinder.faqQ1: Ni wakati gani mzuri wa kutembelea?
parksFinder.faqA1: Juni–Oktoba ni kipindi bora cha kutazama wanyama kaskazini; kusini na magharibi pia hupendeza wakati wa kiangazi. Tunashauri kulingana na hifadhi.
parksFinder.faqA2: Ndiyo — kila safari ya Kabengo hujumuisha ada za hifadhi na uhifadhi katika bei ya kila mtu. Hakuna mshangao unapowasili.
parksFinder.faqA3: Chagua hifadhi au tuambie orodha yako, tunatuma pendekezo, unaliboresha, kisha malipo ya awali huthibitisha safari.

accommodationsFinder.signatureSub: lodge na kambi zetu bora zaidi
accommodationsFinder.emptyBody: Tuambie mtindo wa malazi unayopenda nasi tutalinganisha lodge na kambi na safari yako.
accommodationsFinder.bandTitle: Kila safari nzuri inahitaji makazi mazuri.
accommodationsFinder.bandBody: Tuambie jinsi unavyopenda kusafiri nasi tutalinganisha kila usiku na matukio ya siku — kutoka kambi za mahema hadi lodge za ukingoni.
accommodationsFinder.faqQ1: Ni huduma gani za chakula zimejumuishwa?
accommodationsFinder.faqA1: Lodge na kambi nyingi za safari ni chakula kamili; baadhi ya kambi za kifahari ni pamoja na kila kitu. Kila malazi huonyesha huduma yake ya chakula kwenye pendekezo lako.
accommodationsFinder.faqA2: Kila mali hukaguliwa binafsi na kushirikiana na timu yetu ya Arusha — huchaguliwa kwa eneo, huduma na tabia, si kamisheni.
accommodationsFinder.faqA3: Bila shaka. Changanya lodge ya kifahari na kambi ya mahema, au boresha usiku wowote — tunaboresha makazi kulingana na kila siku ya safari yako.
accommodationsFinder.guestFavouritesSub: malazi ambayo wasafiri wetu huhifadhi zaidi

activitiesFinder.popularSub: shughuli ambazo wasafiri wetu huongeza zaidi
activitiesFinder.emptyBody: Jaribu utafutaji tofauti — au tuambie unachotamani nasi tutakiweka katika safari yako.
activitiesFinder.bandBody: Tuambie matukio yanayokuvutia — safari za puto, safari za kutembea, ziara za kitamaduni, nyongeza za Zanzibar — na timu yetu ya wenyeji itayaunganisha katika safari yako maalum ya Tanzania.
activitiesFinder.faqQ1: Je, matukio yamejumuishwa katika safari yangu?
activitiesFinder.faqA1: Matukio mengi hujengwa moja kwa moja katika ratiba yako maalum. Tuambie kinachokuvutia nasi tutakijumuisha katika bei yako.
activitiesFinder.faqQ2: Je, naweza kuongeza tukio kwenye safari iliyopo?
activitiesFinder.faqA2: Ndiyo. Safari za puto, safari za usiku, ziara za kitamaduni na nyongeza za Zanzibar zinaweza kuongezwa kwenye ratiba yoyote — muulize mpangaji wako wa safari.
activitiesFinder.faqA3: Baadhi yana ada za hifadhi au za waendeshaji (kwa mfano safari za puto au kutembelea sokwe). Tunatoa bei ya kila kitu kwa uwazi kabla hujathibitisha.

parkDetail.gettingThere: Jinsi ya kufika na mambo ya msingi
parkDetail.faqBestTimeQ: Ni wakati gani bora wa kutembelea {name}?
parkDetail.faqWildlifeA: Tarajia Wakubwa Watano pamoja na duma, twiga, kiboko na wanyama wengi wa nyanda — kundi kamili la safari ya Afrika Mashariki.
parkDetail.railSub: Pendekezo la bure, bila masharti kutoka kwa mtaalamu wa hapa — hifadhi hii tayari imezingatiwa.
parkDetail.railReply: Jibu ndani ya saa 24 · mtu halisi

activityDetail.parksOfferingSub: Liunganishe katika safari kwenye hifadhi hizi.
activityDetail.railSub: Pendekezo la bure, bila masharti kutoka kwa mtaalamu wa hapa — tukio hili tayari limezingatiwa.
activityDetail.bandTitle: Uko tayari kuongeza {name} kwenye safari yako?
activityDetail.bandBody: Iambie timu yetu ya Arusha unachotamani. Tutaandaa safari maalum inayojumuisha {name} na kujibu ndani ya saa 24.

itineraryDetail.whereStaySub: Malazi na kambi {count} katika safari nzima.
itineraryDetail.includeNote: Tuulize hasa kilichojumuishwa kwa tarehe zako — tutathibitisha kila kitu kwa maandishi kabla hujaweka nafasi.
itineraryDetail.priceNote: ≈ {total} kwa kundi lako kama ilivyonukuliwa. Bei ya mwisho hutegemea msimu, ukubwa wa kundi na uchaguzi wa malazi — tuambie tarehe zako kwa bei kamili.
itineraryDetail.bandBody: Tutumie tarehe zako nasi tutabinafsisha kila siku kwa ajili yako — mtaalamu halisi wa Arusha hujibu ndani ya saa 24.
